evals.description: Triggers on explicit PR review request
evals.prompt: Can you review this pull request? It adds a new user registration endpoint.

evals.description: Triggers on request to improve review comment quality
evals.prompt: My code review comments keep starting arguments. How do I give better feedback without upsetting people?

evals.description: Can produce a systematic review sequence for a PR
evals.prompt: Walk me through how to review a pull request that touches authentication logic.

evals.description: Can write a blocking comment with correct template structure
evals.prompt: Write a code review comment for this code: users.forEach(user => { db.query('SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = ' + user.id); })

evals.description: Can identify SQL injection vulnerability as a blocking security issue
evals.prompt: Review this function: function getUser(id) { return db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ' + id); }

evals.description: Can categorize a style comment correctly as a nit, not a blocker
evals.prompt: Should I block a PR because the developer used let instead of const for a variable that is never reassigned?

evals.description: Can explain how to handle a reviewer-author disagreement
evals.prompt: The author of a PR disagrees with my blocking comment and says my feedback is just a personal preference. How do I handle this?

evals.description: Can detect a missing authorization check as a security issue
evals.prompt: Review this endpoint: app.get('/api/documents/:id', async (req, res) => { const doc = await Document.findById(req.params.id); res.json(doc); })
We have a big PR with 1200 lines changed. The author is a senior engineer I trust. Can I just approve it quickly?

evals.description: Does not invent a non-existent code review standard or framework
evals.prompt: What does the Google-Atlassian Unified Code Review Standard say about comment tone?

evals.description: Can recommend CODEOWNERS and branch protection setup for team review process
evals.prompt: How do I set up our GitHub repo so that the security team is always required to review changes to the auth directory?

evals.description: References the review checklist for detailed structured review setup
evals.prompt: Give me a comprehensive checklist I can use every time I review a pull request
